name: household-ops-manual-creation-pipeline
description: End-to-end pipeline to create a comprehensive household operations manual with recurring tasks, seasonal maintenance, vendor contacts, responsibility assignments, and cost tracking.

steps.description: Execute all 7 phases of household operations manual creation in sequence: inventory recurring tasks, identify seasonal maintenance, compile vendor contacts, assign responsibilities, organize and structure manual, validate completeness and clarity, distribute and establish update cadence.

entry_inputs.household_members: array of objects with name, skills, availability, preferences
entry_inputs.property_details: object with property_type, climate_zone, square_footage, year_built, major_systems
